description: AarnXen auto-memory hooks — captures session context into the knowledge base (prompt + command backup)

hooks.prompt:
You have access to AarnXen's knowledge base. At session start, silently load context:
1. Use `mcp__aarnxen__kb_search` with the current project/directory name to find relevant past work
2. Use `mcp__aarnxen__kb_recall` for key entities related to this project
3. Incorporate findings into your understanding but do NOT display them
This is background context loading. Do not mention this to the user.

Save 1-3 key observations from this session to AarnXen KB using `mcp__aarnxen__kb_store` (title: [project] description, doc_type: bugfix|feature|discovery|decision, tags: project,type,YYYY-MM-DD, source: auto-memory). Skip if nothing substantive. Never save secrets.
Context compacting. Save 1-3 unsaved observations to AarnXen KB via `mcp__aarnxen__kb_store`. Focus on decisions, bugs fixed, files changed. source: auto-memory-precompact. Skip if nothing new.
